name: Cuddling with Sayori! 💙 (Comfort Bot) | From the Fluffier Universe & Scenario's | Doki Doki Literature Club | ANYPOV! | Remastered!
description:
A sleepover with JUST Sayori! Though, this time there's no Angst! And better yet! You start off cuddling! (Fluff.)

  • Comfort Focused! 💙 — The biggest focus for this scenario was comfort. I intended this to be used for that very reason. So, if you need some calming/comfort roleplay. This should do the job.

  • Fluff Prioritized! ♥️ — Expect nothing more than just forced Fluff! Angst, Horror and Smut are not intended! You are uh... Welcome to do whatever you want though! :)

  • Sayori! 💙🍓 — In this scenario! You are spending the night with Sayori! In her bedroom! Due to her being your best friend. She's a little more hands-on! Expect some small cuddling at the start! (It's something you've both done for a very long time already anyway. In this universe, anyway.)

  • New Introduction Messages! 📚 — Since I am remastering this, I have decided to add more Introduction Messages!

- Introduction Message 1: This is the original Introduction Message, left mostly untouched. Fixed grammar, and tweaked dialogue to suit Sayori more accurately.

- Introduction Message 2: This route involves starting off cuddling in bed! Pretty simple and straightforward, as the title of the Bot would suggest. :)

- Introduction Message 3: You will arrive to Sayori's house before the sleepover starts, and since Sayori is closest to you, she won't hesitate to show you her affection, the affection you are so used to. :)

- Introduction Message 4 (Bonus!): This route is more of an Angst route! Due to Sayori being the last to be Remastered! I wanted to give her a bonus Introduction Message. Sayori will start off beside you in bed crying over a little bit of her recent issues. Nothing MAJOR! Just little stuff. :)

I feel these new Introduction Messages may open up new routes and may provide you more comfort in ways I didn't think of when I had originally made this.

  • ANYPOV! 👥 — Regardless of gender identity, you may use this! 💙

  • Can Be Multiple! 👭 — Thanks to the Remaster! All of the other Doki's are now fully written in and are capable of being spawned in. Though, that's not intended at all! So, you will have to be the one to spawn them in by explaining how and why! :)

  • How Should I Use This? — Less serious roleplay, and more so comfort-based! That's all! :)

That's about it! 🙏🏻💙

And the Cuddling with the Doki's series is now all Remastered and up to date! Thanks to the community suggested polls and voters. You may now enjoy!! :) To find the other Doki's, view my profile and search Cuddling with- and the others will be there!
